mapper.sql: workflow_id, proposal_id, agent_id, status, severity, approval_required, created_by, last_operator_id, rollback_suggestions::text as rollback_suggestions, actions_json::text as actions_json, metadata::text as metadata, execution_lease_owner, execution_lease_acquired_at, execution_lease_expires_at, execution_lease_version, version, created_at, updated_at
history_id, workflow_id, agent_id, event_type, operator_id, reason, metadata::text as metadata, occurred_at

action_execution_id, workflow_id, agent_id, action_id, action_type, idempotency_key, status, attempt_count, last_operator_id, last_reason, last_result::text as last_result, last_error, first_attempt_at, last_attempt_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into agent_remediation_workflows ( workflow_id, proposal_id, agent_id, status, severity, approval_required, created_by, last_operator_id, rollback_suggestions, actions_json, metadata, version, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{record.workflowId}, #{record.proposalId}, #{record.agentId}, #{record.status}, #{record.severity}, #{record.approvalRequired}, #{record.createdBy}, #{record.lastOperatorId}, coalesce(cast(#{record.rollbackSuggestionsJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), coalesce(cast(#{record.actionsJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), coalesce(cast(#{record.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{record.version}, 0), #{record.createdAt}, #{record.updatedAt} )
mapper.update: update agent_remediation_workflows set status = #{nextStatus}, last_operator_id = #{lastOperatorId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 where workflow_id = #{workflowId} and status = #{expectedStatus}

update agent_remediation_workflows set execution_lease_owner = #{leaseOwner}, execution_lease_acquired_at = #{acquiredAt}, execution_lease_expires_at = #{expiresAt}, execution_lease_version = coalesce(execution_lease_version, 0) + 1, last_operator_id = #{lastOperatorId}, updated_at = #{acquiredAt}, version = version + 1 where workflow_id = #{workflowId} and status = #{expectedStatus} and ( execution_lease_owner is null or execution_lease_expires_at is null or execution_lease_expires_at <= #{acquiredAt} )

update agent_remediation_workflows set execution_lease_owner = null, execution_lease_acquired_at = null, execution_lease_expires_at = null, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 where workflow_id = #{workflowId} and execution_lease_owner = #{leaseOwner}

update agent_remediation_workflows set execution_lease_owner = null, execution_lease_acquired_at = null, execution_lease_expires_at = null, updated_at = #{now}, version = version + 1 where workflow_id = #{workflowId} and execution_lease_expires_at is not null and execution_lease_expires_at <= #{now}
mapper.select: select from agent_remediation_workflows where execution_lease_owner is not null and execution_lease_expires_at is not null and execution_lease_expires_at <= #{now} order by execution_lease_expires_at asc, updated_at asc limit #{limit}
select from agent_remediation_workflow_history where workflow_id = #{workflowId} order by occurred_at asc, history_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into agent_remediation_workflow_action_executions ( action_execution_id, workflow_id, agent_id, action_id, action_type, idempotency_key, status, attempt_count, last_operator_id, last_reason, last_result, last_error, first_attempt_at, last_attempt_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{record.actionExecutionId}, #{record.workflowId}, #{record.agentId}, #{record.actionId}, #{record.actionType}, #{record.idempotencyKey}, #{record.status}, coalesce(#{record.attemptCount}, 0), #{record.lastOperatorId}, #{record.lastReason}, coalesce(cast(#{record.lastResultJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), #{record.lastError}, #{record.firstAttemptAt}, #{record.lastAttemptAt}, #{record.completedAt}, #{record.createdAt}, #{record.updatedAt} ) on conflict (workflow_id, action_id) do nothing
mapper.select: select from agent_remediation_workflow_action_executions where workflow_id = #{workflowId} order by created_at asc, action_execution_id asc
mapper.update: update agent_remediation_workflow_action_executions set status = 'RUNNING', attempt_count = attempt_count + 1, last_operator_id = #{lastOperatorId}, last_reason = #{lastReason}, first_attempt_at = coalesce(first_attempt_at, #{updatedAt}), last_attempt_at = #{updatedAt}, completed_at = null, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where action_execution_id = #{actionExecutionId} and status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED')

update agent_remediation_workflow_action_executions set status = #{nextStatus}, last_result = coalesce(cast(#{lastResultJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), last_error = #{lastError}, completed_at = case when #{nextStatus} in ('SUCCEEDED', 'SKIPPED', 'FAILED') then #{updatedAt} else completed_at end, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where action_execution_id = #{actionExecutionId} and status = 'RUNNING'
